nodes.name: architect-checklist
nodes.summary: Comprehensive architecture review checklist ensuring technical designs meet quality, scalability, and maintainability standards before implementation

nodes.name: change-checklist
nodes.summary: Checklist for validating change management procedures when modifying existing system components or workflows

nodes.name: pm-checklist
nodes.summary: Product manager checklist for ensuring PRDs, epics, and feature definitions are complete and well-structured

nodes.name: po-master-checklist
nodes.summary: Master product owner checklist covering all aspects of story creation, acceptance criteria, and sprint readiness

nodes.name: story-dod-checklist
nodes.summary: Definition of Done checklist for user stories, ensuring all completion criteria are met before marking a story done

nodes.name: story-draft-checklist
nodes.summary: Checklist for validating that user story drafts meet quality standards before refinement and sprint planning
